symptom: years of big toe flare-ups and now lumpy swollen fingers and one knuckle that leaked a chalky paste
hook: lumpy masses were bulging from several finger joints with punched-out holes in the bone beneath them
whatYouSee: Lumpy dense masses bulging out from several finger joints with punched-out holes in the bone right beneath them.
whyItMatters: Years of high uric acid let hard chalky crystal deposits build up around the joints until they physically ate into the bone.
treatment: Urate-lowering drugs like allopurinol slowly dissolve the deposits and flare treatment settles the acute attacks.
takeaway: The body can turn its own waste product into chalk.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with years of big toe flare-ups and now lumpy swollen fingers and one knuckle that leaked a chalky paste.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And lumpy masses were bulging from several finger joints with punched-out holes in the bone beneath them.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Tophaceous gout

👀 What you see:
Lumpy dense masses bulging out from several finger joints with punched-out holes in the bone right beneath them.

🦴 Why it matters:
Years of high uric acid let hard chalky crystal deposits build up around the joints until they physically ate into the bone.

💊 Treatment:

Urate-lowering drugs like allopurinol slowly dissolve the deposits and flare treatment settles the acute attacks.
